command:
echo "=== Watching BOTH agents for 80s. Send your two @mention tests now. ==="
echo "1) @RemyDeviDollz_bot what's your name?"
echo "2) @SakuraChanAssistant_bot what's your name?"
echo ""

# Watch Sakura (vm-hermes .202)
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "LB=\$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log); for i in \$(seq 1 16); do sleep 5; tail -n +\$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'inbound|response ready' | sed 's/^/[SAKURA] /'; LB=\$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log); done" &
SAKURA_PID=$!

# Watch Remy (vm-openclaw .199)
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "LF=/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log; LB=\$(wc -l < \$LF 2>/dev/null||echo 0); for i in \$(seq 1 16); do sleep 5; tail -n +\$((LB+1)) \$LF 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'tool-policy|agent.*run|telegram.*send' | grep -oE 'tool policy removed|telegram' | head -1 | sed 's/^/[REMY] processing /'; LB=\$(wc -l < \$LF 2>/dev/null||echo 0); done" &
REMY_PID=$!

wait $SAKURA_PID
wait $REMY_PID
echo ""
echo "=== Done watching ==="
